title: Twin Doors
description: Allows paired doors to open and close simultaneously when interacting with one of them, making double doors work as a single, seamless unit.
body: This datapack improves door behavior by allowing paired doors to open and close simultaneously when interacting with just one of them. It makes double doors function as a single, cohesive unit, removing the need to click each door separately. The result is smoother interaction, cleaner builds, and a more natural feel that blends seamlessly into normal gameplay without changing the game’s balance or adding new blocks or items.
